overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a cloaked character traversing a snowy mountainous landscape. The character walks along a narrow cliffside path toward a massive glowing red Erdtree dominating the sky, then transitions to a desolate snow-covered field filled with dead trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain cliffside walkway with ornate stone railing

events.description: character turns right and begins descending along the curved pathway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow snow-covered path, approaching the massive glowing Erdtree visible ahead

entered.detail: carved stone barrier covered in snow running along the right side of the path
steep rocky cliff dropping off to the left of the pathway
colossal glowing tree with red-gold branches dominating the sky
snow-dusted stone walkway with intricate edge carvings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snow-covered stone pathway hugging a cliff edge. An ornate stone railing lines the right side while a steep drop falls away to the left. Ahead, the massive glowing Erdtree illuminates the sky with red-gold light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered precipice with view of clouds below

events.description: path opens from narrow cliffside to wide open area revealing sea of clouds below
screen fades to deep red darkness indicating transition to new location

agents.ego_description: walking across open snow toward the massive Erdtree which grows to fill the entire sky

entered.detail: vast layer of clouds visible far below the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide precipice with clouds visible far below. The character walks across open snow directly toward the colossal Erdtree, which grows to dominate the entire sky with intense red-gold luminescence before the screen fades to red.

scene_state.functional_zone: desolate snow field with dead trees and distant ruins

events.description: fade from red reveals new landscape of snow-covered dead tree forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the desolate field, navigating between dead trees and ruins

entered.detail: leafless black trees covered in snow scattered across the landscape
ruined stone structures barely visible through the hazy distance
overcast grey-pink sky with red embers falling like snow

segments.scene_description: Following a red fade transition, the scene reveals a desolate snow-covered field filled with dead leafless trees. The sky is overcast with grey-pink hues and falling red embers. The character walks through this bleak landscape toward distant ruins, the Erdtree no longer visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a narrow cliffside path toward a celestial beacon, eventually transitioning into a desolate, ember-strewn wasteland. It begins with a character walking along a snow-covered stone pathway hugging a cliff edge, guided by the red-gold luminescence of a massive Erdtree dominating the horizon. As the path opens into a wide precipice with clouds swirling far below, the camera moves directly toward the colossal tree until its intense light consumes the frame in a red fade. The scene then shifts to a bleak, snow-covered field filled with dead leafless trees under an overcast grey-pink sky. Finally, the character traverses this desolate landscape amidst falling red embers, moving toward distant ruins as the glowing Erdtree vanishes from sight.
